articles.title: Which Chips Actually Matter? Europe Reassesses Its Semiconductor Strategy After Nexperia Wakeup Call
articles.summary: The political shockwaves from the Nexperia episode are still reverberating across Europe’s semiconductor debate. What began as a company-specific controversy has evolved into a broader strategic question:
articles.title_zh: 哪些晶片真正重要？歐洲在 Nexperia 警示後重新評估其半導體戰略
articles.summary_zh: Nexperia 事件引發的政治衝擊仍在歐洲半導體辯論中持續迴盪。起初針對特定公司的爭議已演變為更廣泛的戰略問題。

articles.title: PCIe 8.0: Enabling The Next Generation Of High Bandwidth Systems
articles.summary: As compute architectures evolve to support increasingly data‑intensive workloads, the role of high‑speed I/O has never been more critical. Artificial intelligence, high‑performance computing, hyperscale infrastructure, and advanced networking all depend on moving massive volumes of data efficiently, reliably, and at scale. The PCI‑SIG’s announcement of PCIe 8.0, which targets 256.0 GT/s per lane and up to 1 TB/s of bidirectional bandwidth in a x16 configuration, marks a major milestone in the evolution of PCI Express. It extends the PCIe roadmap well into the next decade while preserving the backward compatibility that has made PCIe the industry’s most trusted interconnect. PCIe 8.0 can be viewed not simply as a new generation with a speed increase, but as a system‑level inflection point.
articles.title_zh: PCIe 8.0：為下一代高頻寬系統賦能
articles.summary_zh: 隨著運算架構不斷演進以支援越來越多數據密集型工作負載，高速 I/O 的角色變得更加關鍵。AI、高效能運算、超大規模基礎設施和先進網路都依賴於高效移動大量數據。

articles.title: Early HBM4 Validation Points The Way For Next Generation AI And HPC Systems
articles.summary: As AI and high‑performance computing systems continue to scale, memory bandwidth has emerged as a primary system‑level constraint. Larger models, higher compute density, and increasingly complex multi‑die designs are driving the need for memory interfaces that can deliver extreme bandwidth while operating within tight power and signal‑integrity margins. High‑Bandwidth Memory (HBM) has become central to meeting these requirements, and the industry’s transition to HBM4 represents a significant inflection point. HBM4 is designed to extend the bandwidth scaling trajectory established by earlier HBM generations, but doing so introduces new technical challenges. Higher data rates, wider interfaces, and denser interconnects place greater stress on the complete system path, spanning controller, PH
articles.title_zh: 早期 HBM4 驗證為下一代 AI 和 HPC 系統指明方向
articles.summary_zh: 隨著 AI 和高效能運算系統持續擴展，記憶體頻寬已成為主要的系統級制約因素。更大的模型、更高的運算密度和日益複雜的多晶粒設計推動了對能提供極端頻寬的記憶體介面的需求。

articles.title: The Coming Breakup Between AI And The Cloud
articles.summary: For a decade, cloud AI has felt inevitable. It powers our voice assistants, photo libraries, recommendation engines, and a growing list of “smart” features we barely notice anymore. Yet beneath the convenience is a fragile dependency: if your connection stutters, your intelligence does too.​ We rarely question this arrangement, but we should. As models grow larger and expectations grow sharper, the cloud is starting to look less like the future of AI and more like a bottleneck. A new paradigm is taking shape: AI that lives and thinks on the devices in your hand, on your desk, and in your car . This isn’t a minor optimization. It’s a structural shift in how intelligence is delivered—one that will separate the next generation of winners from those still assuming everything must run in the da
articles.title_zh: AI 與雲端的即將分離
articles.summary_zh: 十年來，雲端 AI 一直顯得勢在必行。但這種便利背後隱藏著一種脆弱的依賴：如果連線中斷，智能也會隨之受阻。

articles.title: Power Integrity Without Blind Spots: A System Level Approach To 3D-ICs
articles.summary: Power delivery has become one of the defining challenges of next-generation semiconductor systems. As AI, high-performance computing, and data-centric workloads drive higher performance and tighter integration, traditional 2D SoC design approaches are reaching their limits. The industry’s shift toward 2.5D and 3D heterogeneous integration promises breakthroughs in performance and efficiency—but it also introduces unprecedented power integrity (PI) complexity. In modern multi-die architectures, power delivery is no longer confined to a single chip. Instead, it spans stacked dies, interposers, bridges, and packages connected by thousands of micro-bumps and TSVs. Small disturbances—voltage droop, simultaneous switching noise (SSN), or impedance resonances—can cascade across the stack, impacti
articles.title_zh: 無盲點的電源完整性：3D-IC 系統級方法
articles.summary_zh: 電源傳輸已成為下一代半導體系統的關鍵挑戰。隨著 AI、高效能運算和數據中心工作負載推動更高效能和更緊密整合，傳統 2D SoC 設計方法正在達到極限。

articles.title: DRAM’s Whac‑A‑Mole Security Crisis
articles.summary: Key takeaways: Rowhammer remains a DRAM security threat, while Rowpress has increasingly become a related threat. New commands issued by the memory controller can help manage refreshes, but they’re not a perfect solution. A smaller, vertical DRAM cell may eliminate the problem, but it’s years away. Rowhammer has been a persistent DRAM issue across several memory generations, worsening as manufacturing technology has advanced. It’s also been joined by a related issue called Rowpress. New refresh commands can help avoid ill effects, but the only hope for eliminating the issues may rest on a new DRAM cell. “Rowhammer is caused by cell-to-cell interference, leading to victim bits to flip,” said Xi-Wei Lin, executive director, applications engineering at Synopsys . “It can be exploited for secu
articles.title_zh: DRAM 的打地鼠式安全危機
articles.summary_zh: Rowhammer 仍是 DRAM 安全威脅，而 Rowpress 已逐漸成為相關威脅。記憶體控制器發出的新命令可幫助管理重新整理，但非完美解決方案。更小的垂直 DRAM 晶胞可能消除該問題，但還需數年。

articles.title: A New Era For Co-Processing
articles.summary: Key Takeaways: There is no single processor capable of executing everything efficiently, meaning that multiple processors are required. Maximum efficiency is gained by minimizing the movement of data. Architects must maximize efficiency for today’s workloads, while also adding enough flexibility to handle tomorrow’s. New processor architectures are rapidly evolving thanks to changing workloads associated with AI, but no one processor can do it all. Coordination is easy on paper, but a lot more difficult in practice. There has never been one processor architecture that can do everything. The humble central processing unit (CPU) has been the primary workhorse for 50 years, but even in the early days of personal computers there was an acknowledgement that some workloads required m
articles.title_zh: 協處理新時代
articles.summary_zh: 沒有單一處理器能高效執行所有任務，因此需要多個處理器。通過最小化數據移動可獲得最大效率。架構師必須最大化當今工作負載的效率，同時增加足夠的靈活性。

articles.title: Rethinking Robotics Reinforcement Learning: A Practical Humanoid Training Workflow
articles.summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) for robotics is often associated with large GPU clusters, distributed infrastructure, and x86-based development environments. Training a humanoid robot with high-fidelity simulation is a resource-intensive workflow that runs in the data center. What if that workflow could run on a single workstation? In this blog post, we explore a complete robotics pipeline built with Isaac Sim and Isaac Lab on NVIDIA DGX Spark, powered by the Grace–Blackwell (GB10) Superchip. We compile the software stack natively on Arm. We run large-scale parallel simulations. We train a humanoid robot to walk over rough terrain. Building a native robotics stack on Arm The workflow begins by building Isaac Sim and Isaac Lab from source directly on the Grace CPU (aarch64). The full stack is c
articles.title_zh: 重新思考機器人強化學習：實用人形機器人訓練工作流程
articles.summary_zh: 機器人強化學習通常與大型 GPU 叢集、分散式基礎設施和 x86 開發環境相關聯。使用高保真模擬訓練人形機器人是一個在數據中心運行的資源密集型工作流程。

articles.title: Fast Isn’t Fast Enough: Redefining Metrics for Edge AI
articles.summary: Key Takeaways : Edge AI performance is about low latency and power efficiency, not peak TOPS. Memory bandwidth and data movement now limit edge AI more than compute. Successful edge AI requires balanced hardware, software, and fast model updates. Experts At The Table : Today’s chip architect must contend with multiple factors when architecting AI processors for fast and efficient performance set against the context of rapidly evolving AI models. Semiconductor Engineering sat down to discuss this with James McNiven, vice president of client computing, Edge AI, at Arm ; Amol Borkar, group director, product management for Tensilica DSPs at Cadence , Jason Lawley, director of product marketing, AI IP at Cadence ; Sharad Chole, chief scientist and co-founder at Expedera ; Justin Endo, director
articles.title_zh: 快速還不夠快：重新定義邊緣 AI 的指標
articles.summary_zh: 邊緣 AI 效能著重於低延遲和電源效率，而非峰值 TOPS。記憶體頻寬和數據移動如今限制邊緣 AI 的程度超過運算。

articles.title: Redefining AI Inference With New Silicon Architecture
articles.summary: AI inference is rapidly becoming the largest and most demanding segment of the AI market, but the cost of running these workloads continues to be a major challenge. VSORA, a fabless semiconductor company, is tackling this problem head-on with a fresh approach to high‑performance AI processing and a deep collaboration with Cadence. VSORA develops advanced AI chips that dramatically reduce the cost per query for data centers while enabling powerful edge AI applications. Its Jotunn8 architecture targets hyperscale inference workloads, while the Tyr product family focuses on high‑performance edge use cases such as autonomous driving. At the heart of VSORA’s innovation is a completely rethought data‑movement architecture. By optimizing how data flows through silicon and ensuring arithmetic unit
articles.title_zh: 用新矽架構重新定義 AI 推論
articles.summary_zh: AI 推論正迅速成為 AI 市場中最大且最具挑戰性的領域，但運行這些工作負載的成本仍是主要難題。無晶圓半導體公司 VSORA 以全新方式應對這一問題。

articles.title: No surprise: Samsung just gave the Samsung Galaxy S26 a perfect design score
articles.summary: Credit: C. Scott Brown / Android Authority TL;DR A Samsung executive said they’d give the Galaxy S26 a “perfect score” for product design. Another executive pointed to consistent design elements across all three models, such as the curved corners and camera island. Samsung also defended the decision to switch from titanium to aluminum on the S26 Ultra. Samsung released the Galaxy S26 series last month, and the phones have a few design changes compared to their predecessors. The company has now shared more details about the design process. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?

articles.title: Date and location for Samsung’s next Unpacked event just leaked
articles.summary: Credit: Android Headlines TL;DR The launch date for Galaxy Z Fold 8, Wide Fold, and Flip 8 has leaked. As per a Korean news outlet, Samsung could launch these devices on July 22. Additionally, it is expected to hold the event in London, rather than the usual locations. Samsung’s upcoming foldables for 2026 are just months away from launch, which is why leaks around the devices are picking up pace. Last month, we saw the first set of visuals suggesting what the Galaxy Z Fold 8 could look like, along with others comparing it to Samsung’s new form factor, the Galaxy Z Wide Fold . Now, we’re learning more details about the event where Samsung will showcase these devices. Korean media recently reported that Samsung has finalized the location for its next Unpacked event, where it will unveil the
articles.title_zh: Samsung 下一場 Unpacked 發表會的日期和地點已洩露
articles.summary_zh: 據韓國媒體報導，Galaxy Z Fold 8、Wide Fold 和 Flip 8 的發布日期已洩露，Samsung 可能將於 7 月 22 日在倫敦舉辦發表會，而非往常的地點。

articles.title: This may be your last chance to get a Samsung Galaxy Z TriFold
articles.summary: Samsung has already discontinued the Galaxy Z TriFold in Korea, but it still has some stock left for the US. That said, the device's discontinuation in the US market is also imminent. So if you want one, but haven't so far managed to grab it because of how quickly it has repeatedly gone out of stock, you will have another chance soon. On April 10, Samsung is restocking the device in the US, both in its online store and also at its physical stores in Cerritos, CA, Bloomington, MN, Elmhurst, NY, Garden City, NY, Glendale, CA, Houston, TX, and Frisco, TX. Do keep in mind that so far...
articles.title_zh: 這可能是你最後一次機會入手 Samsung Galaxy Z TriFold
articles.summary_zh: Samsung 已在韓國停產 Galaxy Z TriFold，但美國市場仍有庫存，不過美國市場的停產也迫在眉睫，如果你想購買但因其反覆缺貨而未能入手，應盡快行動。

articles.title: Samsung Networks boss wonders if AI-RAN is too hot to handle
articles.summary: Nvidia's chips need to be cheaper and less power-hungry to be deployed across mobile network sites, says Samsung's Woojune Kim.
articles.title_zh: Samsung Networks老闆質疑AI-RAN是否過於複雜
articles.summary_zh: Samsung的Woojune Kim表示，Nvidia的晶片需要更便宜且耗電量更低，才能在行動網路站點中大規模部署。

articles.title: Goldman-Backed Go Taxi App Said to Plan Japan IPO This Year
articles.summary: Japan’s most popular taxi-hailing provider Go Inc. is planning an initial public offering this year which could raise several hundred million dollars, according to people familiar with the matter.
articles.title_zh: 高盛支持的 Go Taxi 應用據稱計劃今年在日本上市
articles.summary_zh: 日本最受歡迎的叫車服務提供商 Go Inc. 計劃在今年進行首次公開發行，可能籌集數億美元。

articles.title: Thomas Peterffy on IBKR's Plan to Professionalize Prediction Markets
articles.summary: A legendary trading entrepreneur says prediction markets are the next big thing.
articles.title_zh: Thomas Peterffy 談 IBKR 將預測市場專業化的計劃
articles.summary_zh: 傳奇交易企業家表示預測市場將是下一個大事件。

articles.title: Odd Lots: Thomas Peterffy on IBKR’s Prediction Markets (Podcast)
articles.summary: Right now, when you think about prediction markets, you basically think about two main companies: Polymarket and Kalshi. And then when you think of what’s being traded on those platforms, there’s a whole range of stuff from elections to sports to real economic outcomes, to totally gonzo random stuff, like who will win the next season of Big Brother. So far, sports is where a lot of the money is. But at least in theory, prediction markets could be a popular instrument for professional, institutio
articles.title_zh: Odd Lots：Thomas Peterffy 談 IBKR 的預測市場（播客）
articles.summary_zh: 當談到預測市場時，主要想到的是 Polymarket 和 Kalshi 兩家公司，這些平台交易的商品涵蓋選舉、體育到真實經濟結果等各類事項。

articles.title: Kia to Use Atlas Robots in US Plant, Develop First Software Car
articles.summary: Kia Corp. will begin using humanoid robots in its US factories from 2029 and is developing its first software-defined vehicle as the South Korean carmaker ramps up investment in new-generation cars and manufacturing technology to better compete with global rivals.
articles.title_zh: 起亞計劃在美國工廠使用 Atlas 機器人、開發首款軟體定義汽車
articles.summary_zh: 起亞公司將從 2029 年開始在美國工廠使用人形機器人，並開發其首款軟體定義汽車，以加強競爭力。

articles.title: AWS推出S3 Files，S3儲存桶現可掛載為檔案系統
articles.summary: AWS發表Amazon S3 Files，讓通用S3儲存桶可掛載為檔案系統，供EC2執行個體、EKS工作負載與Lambda函式存取，並可用於部分ECS部署。該服務底層是Amazon EFS，活躍資料延遲約1毫秒，檔案系統與S3儲存桶之間可自動雙向同步，目前已在所有AWS商用地區上線。

articles.title: 行政院通過廢清法、循環法修法草案，將接軌歐盟相關法規趨勢鼓勵以綠色產品設計、維修或再利用鼓勵資源循環經濟
articles.summary:
行政院今天（4/9）通過環境部研擬的「資源回收再利用法」修正草案及「廢棄物清理法」(簡稱廢清法)部分條文修正草案，接下來將送立法院審議。其中立法已超過20年的「資源回收再利用法」改名為「資源循環推動法」(簡稱循環法)，接軌歐洲等國際相關資源循環利用的立法趨勢，鼓勵產品綠色設計、以回收及維修取代廢棄，鼓勵資源循環利用產業發展。
行政院長卓榮泰表示，面對全球資源有限性及環境永續挑戰，我國正推動雙軸轉型，建構循環治理的綠色成長模式。環境部推動環境雙法修正，一方面透過廢清法遏止廢棄物的非法棄置，另一方面透過循環法促進循環經濟發展，從產業、環境及社會等多面向整體推動。

articles.title: Google與美國航空用AI調整航線，減少飛機凝結尾帶來的暖化影響
articles.summary: Google公布一項結合AI與航空營運的實地研究成果，顯示透過AI預測並調整飛行路徑，可降低飛機凝結尾（contrails）對氣候的影響。這項研究由Google Research與美國航空（American Airlines）、航班規畫軟體業者Flightkeys等單位合作，並於2025年1月中旬至5月中旬進行為期17週的隨機對照試驗，將凝結尾預測整合至既有航班規畫流程中。
articles.title_zh: Google與美國航空用AI調整航線，減少飛機凝結尾帶來的暖化影響
articles.summary_zh: Google公布一項結合AI與航空營運的實地研究成果，顯示透過AI預測並調整飛行路徑，可降低飛機凝結尾（contrails）對氣候的影響。這項研究由Google Research與美國航空（American Airlines）、航班規畫軟體業者Flightkeys等單位合作，並於2025年1月中旬至5月中旬進行為期17週的隨機對照試驗，將凝結尾預測整合至既有航班規畫流程中。

articles.title: 美上訴法院挺國防部，Anthropic兩案出現判決分歧
articles.summary:
AI公司Anthropic近期針對美國政府提出兩項訴訟，分別挑戰五角大廈將其列為「供應鏈風險」（Supply Chain Risk，SCR），以及要求聯邦機構全面停止使用其Claude模型的行政命令。隨著案件進入不同法院審理，目前已出現判決分歧。
針對「全面停用Claude模型」的措施，加州聯邦法院於3月底裁定，暫時禁止政府執行該命令，認為此舉可能涉及違憲，特別是對企業AI安全立場的報復，以及未提供充分申辯機會，因而發出初步禁制令，使Anthropic得以在案件審理期間維持既有業務與部分政府合作。
articles.title_zh: 美上訴法院挺國防部，Anthropic兩案出現判決分歧
articles.summary_zh:

針對「全面停用Claude模型」的措施，加州聯邦法院於3月底裁定，暫時禁止政府執行該命令，認為此舉可能涉及違憲，特別是對企業AI安全立場的報復，以及未提供充分申辯機會，因而發出初步禁制令，使Anthropic得以在案件審理期間維持既有業務與部分政府合作。

articles.title: 【資安日報】4月9日，Anthropic全新模型漏洞挖掘能力超群，直逼人類頂尖駭客
articles.summary:
Anthropic發布預覽版Claude Mythos，AI資安能力直逼頂尖人類駭客，該公司宣布啟動全球資安防禦計畫
Anthropic發表全新通用語言模型Claude Mythos預覽版，該模型已自主發現數千個橫跨作業系統、瀏覽器，以及開源軟體的零時差漏洞，並同步啟動全球資安防禦計畫Project Glasswing，集結十多家科技與金融公司，納入逾40個關鍵基礎設施組織，優先提供模型存取以加速漏洞修補。

articles.title: 科技1分鐘：邏輯晶片製程3階段（FEoL、MoL與BEoL）

articles.title: 科技1分鐘：應變規（Strain Gauge）
articles.summary: 應變規（Strain Gauge）是一種用於測量物體受力後「變形量（應變）」的感測器，又稱應變計或應變片。在結構工程與電子精密製造的領域裡，物體受力產生的微小形變往往是肉眼難以察覺的，但這些微米等級的變化，卻...

articles.title: The Galaxy A57 does one thing better than any budget Android phone, and it’s a game-changer
articles.summary: Credit: Tushar Mehta / Android Authority The sub-$600 Android phone category has plenty of reasonably good options. If you asked me a month ago to pick one, I would have probably suggested the OnePlus 15R for its top-tier gaming chops or the Pixel 10a for its handy feel and the unadulterated Android experience with Pixel-exclusive perks. I’d even point the more adventurous souls to the Nothing Phone 4a Pro . More recently, however, another more promising candidate has crept onto my list: the Samsung Galaxy A57.
articles.title_zh: Galaxy A57 在一項功能上勝過任何預算型 Android 手機，這是個遊戲規則改變者
articles.summary_zh: 在 600 美元以下的 Android 手機類別中，Galaxy A57 在某項功能上表現出色。一個月前，我會推薦 OnePlus 15R 的頂級遊戲性能或 Pixel 10a 的便利性和純正 Android 體驗。

articles.title: AI基礎設施競賽新護城河!？美綠色資料中心業者砸5,300萬美元買下風電設施擁自主綠電來源
articles.summary:
美國專門開發及營運綠能資料中心的Soluna Holdings近期宣布以5,300萬美元收購位於德州、裝置容量150MW的風電業者Briscoe Wind Farm。從資料中心的單純用電者，轉型為能源生產者，突顯在全球AI算力基礎設施加速擴張下，能源與數位基礎設施整合的趨勢。
Soluna藉此完成Dorothy專案的園區垂直整合，從土地、再生能源到資料中心算力基礎設施皆由該公司掌握，強化成本控制與供電穩定性。
在永續IT架構下，能源供應已成為全球AI與高效能運算（HPC）擴張的主要瓶頸。過去仰賴電力採購協議（PPA）的模式，藉此取得再生能源，一方面降低碳排，也能避免自行建置風機或太陽能設施的成本與風險。
